name: abnormal-mcp
description: MCP server for Abnormal Security — AI-powered threat detection, case management, and email remediation.
long_description: Provides Claude with tools to interact with the Abnormal Security API. Supports listing and inspecting threats, analysing individual emails, triggering remediations, reviewing abuse mailbox reports, and managing security investigation cases.

api_token.title: API Token
api_token.description: Your Abnormal Security API token. Generate one in the Abnormal portal under Settings > Integrations > API.
